form.label: Trends
form.description: Historical view of status TRANSITIONS. Snapshots only log when an entity changes state (or is observed for the first time), so the index records changes -- not steady state. Use Home or Manage entities for the current "OK vs not" picture.

search.query: index=`carbide_index` sourcetype="carbide:status" entity_type="$type_tok$" | fields _time, entity_key, entity_type, status, previous_status, event_kind, current_gap, current_latency, max_latency_seconds, max_gap_seconds, tracking_mode, asset_criticality
| search NOT event_kind="heartbeat" | timechart count by status
| search NOT event_kind="heartbeat" | eval transition = coalesce(previous_status,"NEW") . " → " . status | stats count by transition | sort - count

panel.title: Most flappy entities (top 20 by transition count)

search.query: | search NOT event_kind="heartbeat" | stats count as transitions by entity_key | sort - transitions | head 20

| search NOT event_kind="heartbeat" | sort - _time | head 100 | eval transition = coalesce(previous_status,"NEW") . " → " . status | table _time, entity_type, entity_key, transition, asset_criticality, current_gap, current_latency, tracking_mode | rename entity_type as "type", entity_key as "entity", tracking_mode as "mode", current_gap as "gap (s)", current_latency as "latency (s)"

format.colorPalette: {"OK → DOWN":#dc4e41,"OK → CRITICAL":#9b1d1d,"OK → LATE":#f8be34,"DOWN → OK":#53a051,"CRITICAL → OK":#53a051,"LATE → OK":#53a051,"NEW → OK":#53a051}

panel.title: Estimated dwell time per status (current window)

html.p: For each entity, we pair consecutive transitions and sum the wall-clock time spent in the originating status. Time before the first transition in the window and after the last are bounded by the query range.

search.query: | sort 0 entity_key, _time | streamstats current=false last(_time) as prev_time, last(status) as prev_status by entity_key | addinfo | eval window_start = coalesce(info_min_time, 0) | fields - info_min_time, info_max_time, info_sid, info_search_time | eval dwell_start = coalesce(prev_time, window_start) | eval dwell_status = coalesce(prev_status, coalesce(previous_status,"NEW")) | eval dwell_seconds = _time - dwell_start | where dwell_seconds > 0 | stats sum(dwell_seconds) as seconds by entity_key, dwell_status | eval dwell = case(seconds<60, round(seconds,0)." s", seconds<3600, round(seconds/60,1)." m", seconds<86400, round(seconds/3600,1)." h", 1=1, round(seconds/86400,1)." d") | eval pair = dwell_status . " (" . dwell . ")" | stats list(pair) as "dwell by status" by entity_key | rename entity_key as entity

| `carbide_cached_status` | where status="DOWN" OR status="CRITICAL" OR status="LATE" | `carbide_humanize_duration(current_gap)` | `carbide_humanize_duration(current_latency)` | sort - current_gap | table entity_type entity_key tracking_mode status current_gap_h current_latency_h | rename entity_type as "type", entity_key as "entity", tracking_mode as "mode", current_gap_h as "gap", current_latency_h as "latency"
